title: Executive Order 6032—Authorizing the Appointment of Mr. Isaac Gregg
text:
Isaac Gregg, who, since June 13, 1924, has been serving in a position in the Post Office Department excepted from civil-service requirements, may be appointed in the classified service without compliance with civil-service rules.
This order is issued upon the recommendation of the Postmaster General.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
February 18, 1933.
